zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd Ieuan於大約1330年出生在威爾士卡迪甘史爾爾-達德時，他的父親Ieuan ap Hywel36歲，母親Gwladus ferch Griffith38歲。他於1390年與Mawd ferch Richard在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利安海亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd Ieuan was born about 1330, in Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Wales, his father, Ieuan ap Hywel, was 36 and his mother, Gwladus ferch Griffith, was 38. He married Mawd ferch Richard in 1390, in Llanychaiarn, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd Ieuan est né environ 1330, à Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan ap Hywel, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwladus ferch Griffith, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mawd ferch Richard en 1390, à Llanychaiarn, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wa: Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd Ieuan um 1330 in Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ieuan ap Hywel 36 und seine Mutter Gwladus ferch Griffith 38. Er hat 1390 in Llanychaiarn, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom Mawd ferch Richard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

Lui sposato Mawd ferch Richard nel 1390, nel Llanychaiarn, Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ieuanが約1330年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアルウイン-ダフイッドで生まれた時，父Ieuan ap Hywelは36歳，母Gwladus ferch Griffithは38歳であった。1390年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアラニーチェイアルンでMawd ferch Richardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ieuan(이)가 대략 1330년 웨일스 카디건실르 w이-다피드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ieuan ap Hywel(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladus ferch Griffith(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 랜이차이아른에서 Mawd ferch Richard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Ieuan nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan ap Hywel, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwladus ferch Griffith, tinha 38 anos. ru.Llanfair Dyffryn Clwyd, Denbighshire, Wa: лланфеир диффрин клвид, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd Ieuan родился около 1330 г. в местности ллвин-дафидд, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ieuan ap Hywel было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladus ferch Griffith, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mawd ferch Richard в 1390 г. в местности лланичеиарн, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

Se casó con Mawd ferch Richard en 1390, en Llanychaiarn, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
